message:
build(deps): bump asupersync to 0.2.5, add ast-grep for heredoc AST analysis

Cargo.toml:
- asupersync: 0.2.4 → 0.2.5 (both main and dev-dependencies)
- Add ast-grep-core 0.40 for tree-sitter-based AST pattern matching
- Add ast-grep-language 0.40 with tree-sitter grammars for bash, python,
  javascript, typescript, and ruby (default-features = false to minimize
  grammar bloat)

These new dependencies enable the runtime risk scorer to parse heredoc
payloads embedded in exec commands and match destructive API calls
(shutil.rmtree, fs.rmSync, FileUtils.rm_rf, etc.) at the AST level
rather than relying on fragile string matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
